CatalystsToTools.Notice: Fabricate migrated {count} catalyst(s) into shared library Tools. Catalysts are now Tools — manage them under the Tools tab of the Crafting System Manager.

Interactable.GMOnlySpawn: Only a GM can place Fabricate interactables on the canvas.
Interactable.NoActiveGM: A GM must be online to gather here.
Interactable.NoEnvironment: This gathering point is not part of any environment yet.
Interactable.EnvironmentDialogHint: Choose the gathering environment for this resource node.
Interactable.DropModifierHint: Hold Alt while dropping to always choose the environment manually.
Interactable.SpawnFailed: Failed to place the Fabricate interactable on the canvas.
Interactable.LinkedVisualMissing: This interactable's linked marker is missing.

Denied.Consumed: This has already been used up.
Denied.UsesExhausted: There's nothing left to use here.
Denied.NotInside: Your token must be inside the area.
Denied.SourceMissing: This interactable is no longer available.
Denied.EnvironmentMissing: This gathering point's environment is missing.
Denied.Generic: You can't interact here right now.

Keybinding.Name: Fabricate: interact here
Keybinding.Hint: Re-open the Fabricate interactable your controlled token is standing in.

Config.Title: Fabricate Interactable
Config.Unavailable: This interactable could not be loaded.
Config.PromptPlaceholder: Shown to players in the interaction prompt
Config.DeletePrompt: Delete this interactable region? This cannot be undone.
Config.RemoveVisualPrompt: How would you like to remove the linked marker?
Config.NoSelection: Select a tile, drawing, or token on the canvas first.
Config.NoVisual: This interactable has no linked marker to jump to.

Browser.Title: Interactable browser
Browser.Hint: Drag an entry onto the canvas, or use Place on current scene.
Browser.RegionOnlyHint: The cubes button places a region with a tile marker; the outlined-square button places a region only, with no visible marker.
Browser.NoTasks: No gathering tasks in this system.

interactableType.label: Interactable type
interactableType.hint: Whether this region acts as a tool station or a gathering task.

sourceUuid.label: Source reference (advanced)
sourceUuid.hint: Internal identity of the linked tool or task. Edit from the Configure Fabricate Interactable window.

systemId.label: Crafting system (advanced)
systemId.hint: Internal id of the owning crafting system.

toolId.label: Tool reference (advanced)
toolId.hint: Internal id of the linked library tool.

taskId.label: Task reference (advanced)
taskId.hint: Internal id of the linked gathering task.

environmentId.label: Environment
environmentId.hint: The gathering environment this resource node belongs to.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Display name shown to players when they can interact.

promptText.label: Prompt text
promptText.hint: Message shown to players on the interaction prompt.

hidden.label: Hidden from players
hidden.hint: Hide the interaction prompt from players.

uuid.label: Linked marker (advanced)
uuid.hint: Internal reference to the linked tile, drawing, or token.

documentName.label: Marker type (advanced)
documentName.hint: Whether the linked marker is a Tile, Drawing, or Token.

mode.label: Marker mode (advanced)
mode.hint: Whether this interactable shows a visible marker or is region-only.

missingPolicy.label: If the marker is missing
missingPolicy.hint: What to do when the linked marker can no longer be found.

node.label: Resource node (advanced)
node.hint: Snapshot of the gathering node's stock and respawn configuration.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.hint: Whether players can currently activate this interactable.

consumed.label: Consumed
consumed.hint: Whether this interactable has been used up.

locked.label: Locked
locked.hint: Whether this interactable is locked against activation.

max.label: Maximum uses
max.hint: Total number of times this interactable may be used (blank for unlimited).

used.label: Uses spent
used.hint: How many times this interactable has been used.

seconds.label: Cooldown (seconds)
seconds.hint: Minimum world-time, in seconds, between activations (blank for none).

lastUsedWorldTime.label: Last used (advanced)
lastUsedWorldTime.hint: World time of the most recent activation.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.hint: How activation is initiated. Currently region entry.

audience.label: Who can activate
audience.hint: Whether only players or everyone can activate this interactable.

Environments.Title: Environments
Environments.Hint: Choose a place to gather. Locked environments are unavailable until your GM enables them.
Environments.Empty: No gathering environments are available for this character yet.

Detail.SelectHint: Select an available environment from the left menu.
Detail.BlindHint: This is a blind gathering site. Attempt a gather to discover what it yields.
Detail.TargetedHint: Choose a task below to attempt.
Detail.SceneGateHint: You can't gather here until you visit the linked scene below.
Detail.HazardChanceHint: Your chance of encountering a hazard while gathering here.
Detail.HazardsHiddenHint: The hazards here are hidden until you gather.
Detail.HazardRiskNote: This area carries a risk of hazards.
Detail.SelectHazardHint: Select a hazard to see its details.
Detail.AwardModeHighest: Only your single best successful find is awarded.
Detail.AwardModeLimited: Up to {x} of your successful finds are awarded.
Detail.HazardImpactSuccess: If a hazard strikes, your gather still succeeds.
Detail.HazardImpactFailure: If a hazard strikes, the gather fails.
Detail.SceneWait: Wait until the GM activates the linked scene.
Detail.NodesLegend: This area's resources are limited and replenish over time.

Theme.Name: Fabricate Theme
Theme.Hint: Choose the colour theme for Fabricate's module UI.

ExperimentalFeatures.Name: Experimental Features
ExperimentalFeatures.Hint: Reserved for future experimental Fabricate features in this world. No current features are gated by this switch. Disabled by default.

Knowledge.LearningDisabled: Learning is not enabled for this crafting system
Knowledge.LinkedItemRequired: Recipe item link is required to learn this recipe
Knowledge.NoMatchingItem: No matching recipe item available to learn
Knowledge.NoNewRecipesLearned: {actor} already knows the matched recipe item recipes.

Manager.GMOnly: Only GMs can manage crafting systems.

Economy.ModeHint: How this system limits how often tasks can be attempted.

Mode.None: No limit — tasks can be attempted freely.

Economy.RegenHint: How much stamina actors recover as world time passes.
Economy.MaxStaminaHint: A number or formula, rolled once per character (e.g. 40 or 4 * @abilities.con.mod). Starting stamina is the value characters begin at — blank means full. See the Gathering Formulas help page for examples.
Economy.RollHint: Roll this character's pool from the max/start expressions
Economy.ResetHint: Re-roll this character's pool from the max/start expressions
Economy.RegenAmountHint: A number or formula, evaluated for each character (e.g. 1 or 1 + @abilities.con.mod). See the Gathering Formulas help page for examples.
Economy.NodesNote: Set each task's node count and respawn on the environment's task inspector.
Economy.NodeStockHint: How many resource nodes remain for this task in this environment.
Economy.TaskStaminaHint: Stamina spent per attempt when this system has stamina enabled.
Economy.TaskStaminaModifiersHint: Adjust the cost for an actor (e.g. a strong character mines for less).
Economy.TaskNodesHint: Finite nodes for this task, depleted as it is gathered and optionally respawning over world time.
Economy.TaskNodesEconomyHint: Canvas per-tile depletion and depleted-tile behavior are only available when this system has resource nodes enabled. Turn on the Resource nodes toggle in the system's Economy settings to author a resource node here.
Economy.RespawnAmountHint: Plain dice only (e.g. 1d4) — no character data.
Economy.DepletedBehaviorHint: How a placed interactable's linked marker looks once this node runs out. Restored automatically when it respawns.

Manager.StartupPending: Fabricate is still loading. The crafting system manager will open when startup finishes.
Manager.Title: Crafting systems
Manager.Subtitle: Manage the system definitions that organize Fabricate components, recipes, gathering, and feature rules.
Manager.SelectSystemHint: Select a system to inspect its configuration.
Manager.SystemLibraryHint: Select a row to view counts and enabled features.
Manager.LoadingSystemsHint: Fabricate is finishing startup before the system library is shown.
Manager.EmptyHint: Create a system to start organizing components and recipes.
Manager.EmptySearchHint: Clear the search to show all configured systems.
Manager.InspectorHint: The inspector shows counts, resolution mode, and enabled features for the selected system.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up your first system
EmptySetup.Hint: Create a crafting system, add item-backed components, then build recipes from those components.
EmptySetup.StepSystem: Create a system for one crafting discipline or ruleset.
EmptySetup.StepComponents: Import world or compendium items as reusable components.
EmptySetup.StepRecipes: Add recipes that consume components and award results.

Manager.PlannedView: {view} is planned for a future release.

SystemEdit.Title: System settings
SystemEdit.Subtitle: Edit base settings for the selected crafting system.
SystemEdit.EditBaseSettingsHint: Changes use the existing admin store persistence and confirmation flows.
SystemEdit.ResolutionModeHint: Changing resolution mode uses the current destructive confirmation and cleanup behavior.
SystemEdit.NoFeatureToggles: No optional feature toggles are present on this system.
SystemEdit.DeepConfigHint: Categories, tags, essences, checks, requirements, visibility, alchemy, and gathering configuration stay in later manager views.

FeatureHint.Gathering: Shows gathering environments and player gathering flows for this system.
FeatureHint.RecipeCategories: Adds category organization to recipe browsing and authoring.
FeatureHint.ItemTags: Enables managed component tags and tag-based ingredient options.
FeatureHint.Essences: Enables essence definitions and essence requirements.
FeatureHint.ComplexRecipes: Keeps legacy complex recipe controls available where this system uses them.
FeatureHint.MultiStepRecipes: Enables explicit recipe steps and step-level requirements.
FeatureHint.CraftingChecks: Enables system-level crafting check configuration in the current admin.
FeatureHint.OutcomeRouting: Enables routed outcome configuration where supported.
FeatureHint.EffectTransfer: Allows crafted results to inherit effects from source components.
FeatureHint.ChatOutput: Posts a summary chat card after crafting and gathering attempts.

Recipe.Title: Recipes
Recipe.Subtitle: Manage recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.LibraryHint: Browse recipes for the selected system and open the existing editor for changes.
Recipe.EmptyHint: Create recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all recipes in this system.
Recipe.InspectorHint: The inspector shows recipe status, structure, and requirements for the selected row.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up recipes
EmptySetup.Hint: Create the first recipe for this system after its reusable components are available.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsHint: Add components before creating recipes so ingredients, tools, and results have reusable items to reference.
EmptySetup.StepStructure: Choose the recipe structure supported by the selected system.
EmptySetup.StepRequirements: Add ingredient sets, tools, and any visibility or timing requirements.
EmptySetup.StepResults: Define result groups and enable the recipe when it is ready for players.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepComponents: Open Components and drop world, compendium, pack, or folder items into this system.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepOrganize: Review component names, source links, tags, essences, and difficulty metadata.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepRecipes: Return to Recipes and build requirements and results from those components.

Component.Title: Components
Component.Subtitle: Manage item-backed components for the selected crafting system.
Component.LibraryHint: Browse item-backed components and open the existing component editor for changes.
Component.DropZoneLabel: Drop Foundry items to add components
Component.DropZoneHint: World, compendium, pack, or folder drops use the existing component import flow for the selected system.
Component.EmptyHint: Drop Foundry items into this page to add components to the selected system.
Component.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all components in this system.
Component.SourceHint: This component keeps a stored source ID for import matching and replacement.
Component.SourceMissingHint: The stored source no longer resolves. Replace the component source or verify the original compendium/world item still exists.
Component.NoSourceHint: This component does not expose a stored source UUID in the current item-card data.
Component.InspectorHint: The inspector shows component identity, origin, tags, essences, and source copy context for the selected row.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up components
EmptySetup.Hint: Import item-backed components before recipes can reference ingredients, tools, results, or essence sources.
EmptySetup.StepImport: Drop world, compendium, pack, or folder items into the component browser.
EmptySetup.StepOrganize: Add tags, essences, source links, and difficulty metadata where the selected system uses them.
EmptySetup.StepRecipes: Use the managed components as recipe requirements, tools, and results.

Component.EditSubtitle: Update tags, essences, and source linkage for this component.
Component.EditMissingHint: Pick a component from the browser to edit its tags, essences, and source linkage.
Component.DiscardDirtyContent: The current component has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?
Component.SaveFailed: Save failed. Try again or refresh the manager.
Component.NoEditableFields: There are no editable tag or essence fields for this component in the selected system.

Identity.Title: Identity
Identity.SourceBackedHint: This component is backed by a Foundry item. Changes to its source item's name, image, or description will be reflected here.

SourceCard.Title: Linked Source Item
SourceCard.ReplaceHint: Drop a Foundry item here to replace the linked source.
SourceCard.NoSourceHint: Drop or replace a Foundry item to link this component to a source.

TagsEdit.Title: Tags
TagsEdit.NoTags: No tags are defined for this system yet.

EssencesEdit.Title: Essences
EssencesEdit.NoEssences: No essences are defined for this system yet.

TagsCategories.Title: Tags & Categories
TagsCategories.Subtitle: Manage recipe category and item tag vocabulary for the selected crafting system.
TagsCategories.LibraryHint: Define recipe categories and item tags before assigning them elsewhere.
TagsCategories.CategoriesHint: General is always available. Add custom categories for recipes that need clearer grouping.
TagsCategories.ItemTagsHint: Use item tags for component organization and tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.GeneralInspectorHint: General is the built-in category for recipes without a custom category and cannot be removed.
TagsCategories.OnlyGeneralHint: Add a custom category when recipes need more specific grouping.
TagsCategories.NoCategoryMatches: No custom categories match this search.
TagsCategories.NoTagsHint: Add tags before using tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.NoTagMatches: No item tags match this search.
TagsCategories.RemoveCategoryConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this category value until you update them.
TagsCategories.RemoveTagConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this tag value until you update them.
TagsCategories.BlankCategoryFeedback: Enter a category name before adding it.
TagsCategories.GeneralReservedFeedback: General is already available as the base category.
TagsCategories.BlankTagFeedback: Enter a tag name before adding it.
TagsCategories.TagNormalizedFeedback: Tag added with cleaned-up lowercase text.
TagsCategories.InspectorHint: Define the vocabulary GMs use when assigning recipe categories and component tags.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksFlat: Categories are flat — each recipe picks one, with no parent or child folders.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksGeneral: General is the reserved fallback for recipes without a custom category.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksTags: Item tags appear on components and on tag-placeholder ingredients in recipes.
TagsCategories.ExamplesEmptyHint: Add a category or tag, then assign it to a recipe or component to see it appear here.

Essence.Title: Essences
Essence.Subtitle: Manage essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.LibraryHint: Browse, create, and maintain essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.CreateSubtitle: Define identity, icon, and source linkage for a new essence.
Essence.CreateNoSourceSubtitle: Define identity and icon for a new essence.
Essence.CreateBandHint: Create and edit essences in the dedicated editor so browse rows stay selection-only.
Essence.EditSubtitle: Update identity, icon, and source linkage for this essence.
Essence.EditNoSourceSubtitle: Update identity and icon for this essence.
Essence.EditHint: Edit identity, icon, and source linkage for the selected essence definition.
Essence.Name: Name
Essence.SourceNoUuid: This component has no source item UUID.
Essence.SourceEvidenceHint: Stored source evidence remains readable until you clear or repair it.
Essence.SourceEditHint: Pick or drop a managed component to provide the effect-transfer source.
Essence.EmptyHint: Create an essence definition to start assigning essence quantities to components.
Essence.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all essences in this system.
Essence.SaveFailed: Save failed. Check for duplicate or blank names and try again.
Essence.DiscardDirtyContent: The current essence has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?
Essence.DeleteBlocked: Remove component usage before deleting this essence.
Essence.UsageBlockedHint: Remove this essence from components before deleting the definition.
Essence.InspectorHint: The inspector shows source linkage and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.InspectorNoSourceHint: The inspector shows identity and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.CreateInspectorHint: The inspector will show the essence ID after the draft is saved.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up essences
EmptySetup.Hint: Create the first essence definition for this system, then assign quantities to components that should contribute that essence.
EmptySetup.StepCreate: Create an essence with a clear name, icon, and description.
EmptySetup.StepAssign: Edit components to assign essence quantities that recipes can require.
EmptySetup.StepTransfer: If effect transfer is enabled, link source components whose effects should carry to crafted results.

Environment.Title: Environments
Environment.Subtitle: Manage gathering environments for the selected crafting system.
Environment.EditSubtitle: Edit scene linkage, environment details, tasks, results, tools, visibility, timing, and validation in the workspace.
Environment.LibraryHint: Browse scene-linked gathering environments and open the existing editor for task authoring.

GatheringTabs.Label: Gathering sections
GatheringTabs.ToolsHint: Manage reusable gathering tools for this crafting system.
GatheringTabs.TasksHint: Browse gathering tasks before attaching them to environments.
GatheringTabs.EncountersHint: Browse reusable hazards before attaching them to environments.
GatheringTabs.SettingsPlaceholderHint: Set system-level drop resolution and hazard rules for gathering.

Tasks.NotUsedInEnvironments: Not used in any environments yet.
Tasks.EmptyHint: Create gathering tasks before attaching them to environments.
Tasks.EmptySearchTitle: No gathering tasks match these filters
Tasks.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all gathering tasks in this system.
Tasks.InspectorHint: The inspector shows gathering task availability, active environment matches, and drop summaries for the selected row.
Tasks.EditSubtitle: Edit availability, identity, and drop rules for the selected gathering task.
Tasks.DiscardChangesPrompt: The current gathering task has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

CompositionLossWarning.Title: This task will leave some environments
CompositionLossWarning.Body: Saving removes this task from these environments:

Tasks.DisabledNotice: Disabled task “{name}” — no longer available in {count} environment(s): {environments}.
Tasks.PlaceholderHint: Detailed authoring fields for gathering tasks are coming later. Use the task browser for selection, duplication, deletion, and status for now.
Tasks.TaskIdentityHint: Name the task, give it a description, choose an image, and toggle whether it is enabled.
Tasks.Name: Name
Tasks.DefaultEnvironmentHint: Used when a dropped node is not inside a tagged scene region. Hold Alt while dropping to always pick manually.
Tasks.DisabledHint: Not available to use in environments.
Tasks.AvailabilityHint: Availability controls whether this task can be attempted. Individual drops can still have their own time and weather modifiers.
Tasks.RequiredToolsHint: Pick tools the actor must wield to attempt this task. All listed tools are required.
Tasks.RequiredToolsLibraryEmptyTitle: No tools in this system's library
Tasks.RequiredToolsLibraryEmptyHint: Open the Tools page from the left rail to add tools first.
Tasks.DropRulesHint: Configure what can drop, how often, and which conditions modify each drop.
Tasks.BiomeModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the gathering environment's biomes.
Tasks.WeatherModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the active weather condition.
Tasks.TimeModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the active time of day.
Tasks.ModifiersApplyOnlyThisDrop: Modifiers below apply only to this drop.
Tasks.ComponentBrowserHint: Drag a component onto any drop rule row to assign or replace it.
Tasks.EmptyDropSearchTitle: No drop rules match this search
Tasks.DropCalculationHelp: Final drop chance = base chance + matching drop modifiers + environment and actor specific modifiers
Tasks.RewardRuleNotice: Multiple drop rows use this component. Current drop rules may award only one matching row.

Hazards.DangerTagsHint: Danger tags let environments opt in to this hazard. Empty matches any environment danger profile.
Hazards.DropRateHint: Chance from 1 to 100 that this hazard drops on a matching gathering attempt before modifiers.
Hazards.BiomeModifiersHint: Adjust this hazard's chance based on the gathering environment's biomes.
Hazards.WeatherModifiersHint: Adjust this hazard's chance based on the active weather condition.
Hazards.TimeModifiersHint: Adjust this hazard's chance based on the active time of day.
Hazards.DropRateInvalid: Drop rate must be between 1 and 100.
Hazards.SceneLinkHint: Optionally link a scene to open when this hazard is triggered.
Hazards.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene here to link it.
Hazards.SceneRemoveTooltip: Right-click to remove the linked scene

HazardScenePrompt.Title: Hazard struck
HazardScenePrompt.Missing: The hazard's linked scene could not be found.

Hazards.EmptyHint: Create reusable hazards before attaching them to environments.
Hazards.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all hazards in this system.
Hazards.SelectHazardHint: Choose a hazard from the browser to edit its identity, matching, and modifiers.
Hazards.InspectorHint: The inspector shows hazard availability, danger tags, drop rate, and active environment usage for the selected row.
Hazards.NotUsedInEnvironments: Not used in any environments yet.
Hazards.EditSubtitle: Edit identity, availability, danger, and modifiers for the selected hazard.
Hazards.DiscardChangesPrompt: The current hazard has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

CompositionLossWarning.Title: This hazard will leave some environments
CompositionLossWarning.Body: Saving removes this hazard from these environments:

Hazards.DisabledNotice: Disabled hazard “{name}” — no longer available in {count} environment(s): {environments}.
Hazards.DeleteConfirm: Delete this hazard? This cannot be undone.
Hazards.HazardIdentityHint: Name the hazard, give it a description, choose an image, and toggle whether it is enabled.
Hazards.AvailabilityHint: Hazards match environments by region, biome, weather, and time of day. Empty fields mean "matches any".
Hazards.Name: Name
Hazards.EnabledHint: This hazard is available when its tags match.
Hazards.DisabledHint: Disabled hazards never match player gathering.
Hazards.HazardModifierHint: Adjusts the d100 roll added before threshold comparison. Leave empty for no modifier.
Hazards.CharacterModifiersHint: Pick reusable actor-driven modifiers from the per-system library. These adjust the threshold, not the roll.
Hazards.CharacterModifiersEmptyLibrary: No character modifiers exist in this system yet. Add them in the Character Modifiers library first.
Hazards.CharacterModifierOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use library expression

Rules.Title: Rules
Rules.HazardsDescription: Choose how matching hazards are applied after a gathering roll.
Rules.HazardOutcomeDescription: Decide whether rolling a hazard still allows the gathering attempt to succeed.
Rules.HazardVisibilityDescription: Control how much hazard information players see.
Rules.ToolBreakageDescription: Decide whether a broken tool fails the gathering attempt or only reports the breakage.
Rules.BiomeModifiersDescription: Decide how multiple matching biome modifiers combine into one drop-rate adjustment.
Rules.BlindCandidateGateDescription: In blind mode, choose whether the generic gather only resolves to tasks the character can attempt, or to any matching task.
Rules.RevealPolicyDescription: Decide whether a blind task is revealed to the player after they attempt it.
Rules.RevealScopeDescription: Who learns the revealed task: just the actor, the controlling user, the party, or everyone.

Conditions.TimeOfDayHint: These values control current time matching for gathering tasks and hazards. Click the name of a time of day to edit it.
Conditions.WeatherHint: These values control weather matching for gathering tasks and hazards. Click the name of a condition to edit it.

Vocabularies.RegionsHint: Environments use one region. Click the name of a region to edit it.
Vocabularies.BiomesHint: Environments can have multiple biomes. Left-click the icon to swap it out, right-click to change the colour.

Environment.EmptyHint: Define gathering tasks and hazards before creating environments, then attach those building blocks to each location players can gather from.
Environment.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all environments in this system.
Environment.InspectorHint: The inspector shows scene imagery, task evidence, draft state, and existing actions for the selected row.

EmptySetup.Title: Plan gathering content
EmptySetup.Hint: Gathering tasks and hazards give environments consistent activities, risks, and rewards across gathering locations.
EmptySetup.StepCreate: Create environments after the gathering task and hazard libraries are ready to attach.
EmptySetup.StepLocation: Link a Foundry scene or write enough location detail for GMs and players.
EmptySetup.StepTasks: Define gathering tasks with their checks, timing, result groups, and failure outcomes.
EmptySetup.StepHazards: Prepare encounter and hazard options that can be reused across risky locations.

Environment.EditHint: Edit scene linkage, environment details, tasks, results, tools, visibility, timing, and validation through the existing draft callbacks.
Environment.EnabledHint: Available to players when the scene matches.
Environment.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene from the Scenes sidebar to link it
Environment.SceneDropReplaceHint: Drag a different scene here to replace this link
Environment.NoValidationIssues: No validation issues are currently reported.
Environment.NoCheckTaskFieldsHint: Routed tasks use result selection from the Results tab.

Composition.AutomaticHint: All matching enabled tasks and hazards are available unless locally excluded.
Composition.ManualHint: Only explicitly included tasks and hazards are available; GMs can force add enabled non-matching tasks and hazards.
Composition.NoIncludedTasks: No tasks are available in this environment yet.
Composition.NoIncludedHazards: No hazards are available in this environment yet.
Composition.NoCandidateTasks: No further matching tasks to include.
Composition.NoCandidateHazards: No further matching hazards to include.
Composition.NoAvailableTasksToAdd: No matching or non-matching tasks to add.
Composition.NoAvailableHazardsToAdd: No matching or non-matching hazards to add.

Overview.Title: Overview
Overview.IdentityHint: Name the environment, describe it, choose an image, and toggle whether it is active.
Overview.SceneLockedImage: Image provided by the linked scene
Overview.SceneLockedImageTooltip: This image comes from the linked scene and can't be edited. Unlink the scene to choose a custom image.
Overview.Name: Name
Overview.RegionHint: Where this environment is (optional). Tasks and hazards match a region if specified.
Overview.BiomesHint: The terrain here. Tasks and hazards match if they share one or more biomes.
Overview.DangerHint: A ceiling — hazards up to and including this level can appear.
Overview.BlindHint: Players get a generic gather action unless tasks are revealed.
Overview.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene here to link it.
Overview.SceneReplaceTooltip: Drop a scene to replace it, or right-click to unlink.

Inspector.Label: Environment inspector
Inspector.NoActiveTasksHint: Add or include tasks in this environment so they appear here.
Inspector.NoActiveHazardsHint: Add or include hazards in this environment so they appear here.
Inspector.SourceHintTask: Composing this task does not modify the reusable source.
Inspector.SourceHintHazard: Composing this hazard does not modify the reusable source.
Inspector.StaleHazard: This hazard is included in this environment but is unavailable because it no longer matches the environment context.
Inspector.StaleTask: This task is included in this environment but is unavailable because it no longer matches the environment context.
Inspector.OverridesHintTask: Drop-rate adjustments apply only in this environment and do not modify the reusable source task.
Inspector.OverridesHintHazard: Drop-rate adjustments apply only in this environment and do not modify the reusable source hazard.
Inspector.NoDropRows: This task has no drop rows to adjust.

Validation.Title: Validation
Validation.CheckRegion: Has a region or is set to "any region"
Validation.CheckAvailableTask: Has at least one available task
Validation.CheckNoStale: Has no stale included tasks or hazards
Validation.IssueNoAvailableTasks: No tasks are available to players.
Validation.IssueActiveNoComposition: Environment is active but has no valid task composition.
Validation.IssueStaleIncluded: Included task or hazard no longer matches the environment.
Validation.IssueStaleIncludedTask: The task "{name}" no longer matches this environment.
Validation.IssueStaleIncludedHazard: The hazard "{name}" no longer matches this environment.
Validation.IssueNoHazardsAtDanger: Danger is set but no hazards are available.
Validation.IssueTaskNoDescription: Available task has no player-facing description.
Validation.IssueTaskNoDescriptionTask: The task "{name}" has no player-facing description.
Validation.IssueLocallyExcluded: Some tasks or hazards are excluded locally.

Tasks.Title: Tasks
Tasks.AutomaticIntro: All matching enabled library tasks are available unless you exclude them here.
Tasks.ManualIntro: Only tasks you explicitly include are available to players. You can add matching tasks or force add non-matching tasks.

Hazards.Title: Hazards
Hazards.AutomaticIntro: All matching enabled library hazards apply unless you exclude them here.
Hazards.ManualIntro: Only hazards you explicitly include apply here. You can add matching hazards or force add non-matching hazards.

CharacterModifiers.Title: Character modifiers
CharacterModifiers.Hint: Define reusable actor-driven modifiers for this system's gathering rows and hazards.
CharacterModifiers.Label: Label
CharacterModifiers.SeedPresetsUnsupported: Preset seeding is only available for dnd5e or pf2e worlds.
CharacterModifiers.EmptyForRow: No character modifier references on this row.
CharacterModifiers.LibraryEmptyHint: Add a modifier to the system library first to reference it here.
CharacterModifiers.RowSectionHint: Modifiers adjust the final chance based on the attempting character.
CharacterModifiers.OverrideHint: Overrides the library expression for this row.

Tools.Title: Tools
Tools.Subtitle: Manage reusable gathering tools and configure how they behave when required by tasks.
Tools.EmptyHint: Add a reusable tool that gathering tasks can require.
Tools.RowCountHint: Define the behavior of tools when used in gathering tasks.
Tools.RequirementHint: Optional actor property that must be greater than zero for the actor to use this tool.
Tools.RequirementInstructions: Enter an actor roll-data property. The tool is available when the value is greater than zero.
Tools.OnBreakDestroyHint: The item is removed from the actor's inventory.
Tools.OnBreakFlagHint: The item remains but is flagged as broken.
Tools.OnBreakReplaceHint: The item is replaced with another component on the actor.
Tools.ReplacementSame: Replacement must differ from the tool component.
Tools.ChangesWarning: Changes to this tool will affect all tasks that require it.
Tools.LabelHint: Optional. Falls back to the component name.

DiscardDirty.Title: Discard unsaved tool changes?
DiscardDirty.Content: The tools library has unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?

ConcurrentEdit.Title: Tools were modified elsewhere
ConcurrentEdit.Content: The library has been modified outside this editor. Overwrite with your changes?

NavigationDirty.Title: Save unsaved tool changes?
NavigationDirty.Content: One or more gathering tools have unsaved changes.

SystemSettings.Title: Crafting System
SystemSettings.NoSystemSelectedHint: Create a new system to configure categories, tags, essences, and rules.
SystemSettings.Name: Name
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeHint: Controls how recipes in this system choose results and which advanced editor controls are available.
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeChangeContent: Changing resolution mode to {mode} will delete {count} recipe(s) in this crafting system and clean up related runs and learned recipes.
SystemSettings.AdvancedOptionsHint: Advanced options let you configure categories, item tags, essence definitions, resolution-driven recipe behaviour, and macro-driven crafting logic.
SystemSettings.AdvancedDisabled: Advanced options are disabled for this system.

Categories.Title: Recipe Categories
Categories.Hint: Organize and filter recipes by category in admin and crafting views.

ItemTags.Title: Item Tags
ItemTags.Hint: Use tags for categorization, sorting, and search in components.

Essences.Title: Essences
Essences.Hint: Define essence types with descriptions and optional source items.
Essences.NoComponentsAvailable: No components have been added to this system yet.

ComplexRecipes.Title: Complex Recipes
ComplexRecipes.Hint: Allow multiple ingredient sets, multiple result groups, and advanced routing controls.

MultiStepRecipes.Title: Multi-Step Recipes
MultiStepRecipes.Hint: Allow recipes to define explicit ordered steps with per-step ingredient/result and time requirements.

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Hint: Enable gathering environments and task configuration for this crafting system.

TimeRequirements.Title: Time Requirements
TimeRequirements.Hint: Allow step-level crafting durations using minutes, hours, days, months, and years.

CurrencyRequirements.Title: Currency Requirements
CurrencyRequirements.Hint: Allow steps to require currency, resolved via system adapter or macros.

PropertyMacros.Title: Property Calculation Macros
PropertyMacros.Hint: Use macros to compute result property updates from crafting context.

CraftingChecks.Title: Crafting Checks
CraftingChecks.Hint: Choose a system-level check macro that returns pass/fail or named outcomes. Leave the macro blank to disable crafting checks.

Alchemy.Title: Alchemy
Alchemy.Hint: Configure the learning and failure behavior used by alchemy attempts in this crafting system.
Alchemy.LearnOnCraft: Learn recipes after a successful attempt
Alchemy.ConsumeOnFail: Consume submitted ingredients on failed attempts

OutcomeRouting.Title: Outcome Routing
OutcomeRouting.Hint: Map crafting-check outcomes to specific result groups when complex recipes are enabled.

EffectTransfer.Title: Effect Transfer
EffectTransfer.Hint: Transfer active effects from consumed ingredients to crafted result items.

RecipeVisibility.Title: Recipe Visibility
RecipeVisibility.Hint: Control which players can see recipes.
RecipeVisibility.PlayerNote: Per-recipe visibility restrictions can be configured in each recipe's editor. Restricted recipes are hidden from all players by default unless specific users are allowed.
RecipeVisibility.ItemLimitUses: Track limited uses on recipe items
RecipeVisibility.DragDropEnabled: Learn recipes from actor item drops

Items.DropZoneLabel: Drag items from sidebar/compendiums here to add them to this crafting system.
Items.SourceUuidCopyFailed: Could not copy source item UUID.
Items.SourceNotFound: The linked source item could not be opened.
Items.NoManagedItemsHint: Drag in world or compendium items to build this system's item library.
Items.NoSystemHint: Create or select a crafting system to manage components.
Items.DropInvalidItem: Drop an Item document from sidebar or compendium.
Items.BulkImportUpdated: Imported {added} new, updated {updated}, skipped {skipped} of {total} items.
Items.DropNotAnItem: Only Item documents can be added as crafting components. Dropped: {type}.
Items.FolderImportSummary: Imported {added} new, updated {updated}, skipped {skipped} of {total} items from folder "{name}".
Items.DropNoSystemSelected: Select a crafting system first before dropping items.

Editor.HintTagsAndEssences: Edit this component's tags and essences.
Editor.NoEditableFields: No editable component fields are enabled for this system.
Editor.NoTagsDefined: No tags defined in this system.
Editor.NoEssencesDefined: No essences defined in this system.

Recipes.NoRecipesHint: Create recipes for the selected crafting system.

Environments.Title: Gathering Environments
Environments.EmptyHint: Create a gathering environment to start configuring where players can gather.
Environments.EmptyActionHint: Create the first environment and configure its gathering tasks.
Environments.StoreUnavailable: Gathering environment data is not available.
Environments.Name: Name
Environments.LinkedSceneReferenceWarning: This linked scene UUID is preserved. If the scene no longer resolves, players are blocked until the reference is repaired.
Environments.NoTasksHint: Add a task so this environment has an activity players can attempt.
Environments.ImmediateTaskHint: Immediate task: resolves as soon as the player starts it.
Environments.TimeRequirementHint: A timed task creates an active gathering run and completes after this duration.
Environments.DefaultFailureOutcomeHint: Default failure feedback is used when no custom outcome is configured.
Environments.FailureOutcomeHint: Used when routed or progressive resolution fails. Use result group name "fail" for the canonical failure keyword.
Environments.NoVisibilityHint: Enable a gate when only some actors should see this task.
Environments.MissingMacroReferenceWarning: This saved macro UUID is not in the current macro list, but the reference is preserved until you change it.
Environments.MissingRollTableReferenceWarning: This saved roll table UUID is not in the current roll table list, but the reference is preserved until you change it.
Environments.RollTableHint: The drawn result name routes by normalized match to a result group name.
Environments.NoToolsHint: Add a tool when this task should require equipment that can break or wear out.
Environments.ToolRequirementHint: Optional expression that must be truthy for the actor to use this tool.
Environments.NoResultGroupsHint: Add a group to define what this task can award.
Environments.NoResultsHint: Add a result item to this group so successful gathering awards something.
Environments.DeleteContent: Delete gathering environment {name}? This also cleans active and historical gathering runs that reference it.
Environments.DiscardDirtyContent: The current gathering environment has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

Import.Title: Import Crafting System
Import.DropPackJson: Drop a pack JSON file or paste pack data

Alchemy.Title: Alchemy
Alchemy.DropIngredients: Drop ingredients here to attempt crafting
Alchemy.Consumed: Ingredients were consumed in the attempt
Alchemy.MisconfigError: Crafting system error — contact your GM
Alchemy.NoDiscoveredRecipesHint: Experiment with components on the workbench to discover new recipes
Alchemy.AutoFillPartial: Auto-fill: {count} ingredient group(s) could not be satisfied
Alchemy.ComponentsNotFound: Could not find any of the workbench components in your inventory
Alchemy.ComponentsMissing: Some components could not be found: {names}

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Subtitle: Choose an actor and gather from available environments.
Gathering.InventoryTarget: Gathered results go to this actor.

Empty.NoSelectableActorsHint: Ask the GM to grant ownership of an actor before gathering.
Empty.SelectEnvironmentForTasks: Select an environment to view its gathering tasks.
Empty.SelectEnvironmentForDetails: Select an environment to view its details.

Blocked.NoSelectableActors: You do not have an actor available for gathering.
Blocked.InvalidRememberedActor: The remembered gathering actor is no longer available.
Blocked.ActorNotSelectable: The selected actor is not available for gathering.
Blocked.NoVisibleTargetedTasks: No visible gathering tasks are available.
Blocked.BlindSoleTaskHidden: No gathering action is available here.
Blocked.NoVisibleTasks: No visible gathering tasks are available.
Blocked.SceneTokenBlocked: Gathering is blocked by the linked scene or token position.
Blocked.SceneMissing: View the linked scene before gathering here.
Blocked.TokenMissing: Move the selected actor token to this environment scene before gathering.
Blocked.DuplicateActiveRun: This actor already has an active gathering run for this task.
Blocked.ToolBlocked: One or more required tools are missing, broken, or fail their requirement.
Blocked.GamePaused: Gathering is unavailable while the game is paused.
Blocked.MissingReference: Gathering cannot start because a referenced record is missing.
Blocked.SystemDisabled: Gathering is disabled for this crafting system.
Blocked.TaskHidden: This gathering task is not visible to the selected actor.
Blocked.TaskMisconfigured: This gathering task needs GM configuration before it can be used.
Blocked.RunCreationFailed: Gathering could not create an active run.
Blocked.AttemptLimitExhausted: No attempts remain for this gathering task.
Blocked.StaminaBlocked: The selected actor does not have enough gathering stamina.
Blocked.BlindNoCandidate: There is nothing you can gather here right now.
Blocked.ConditionsBlocked: Current weather or time-of-day does not allow this task.

Diagnostics.MissingCharacterModifier: Character modifier "{id}" is not defined in this system's library.
Diagnostics.MacroOverrideMissingUuid: A row override using the macro provider is missing a macro UUID.
Diagnostics.CharacterModifierBoundsInvalid: A row character modifier has min > max.
Diagnostics.CharacterModifierNonFinite: A character modifier expression did not resolve to a finite number.

ShoppingList.Title: Shopping List
ShoppingList.Empty: No recipes added to shopping list
